worthClicking.author: @arena
worthClicking.why: Code Arena puts Opus 4.7 #1 with a ~130pt lead over GPT and Gemini — hard benchmark data worth knowing before positioning conversations.

worthClicking.author: @mercor_ai
worthClicking.why: APEX-SWE benchmark shows Opus 4.7 at 41.3%, just 0.2% behind GPT 5.3 Codex — narrows the 'Claude vs OpenAI for coding' debate to a coin flip.

worthClicking.author: @GergelyOrosz
worthClicking.why: A credible engineering voice calling Opus 4.7 'openly condescending' — this is the kind of trust/reliability complaint that kills enterprise adoption.

worthClicking.author: @ImSh4yy
worthClicking.why: Concise summary of the Opus 4.7 value problem: more expensive, slower, edge only in design and prose — mirrors what product buyers will hear.

worthClicking.author: @signulll
worthClicking.why: Sharp take on how OpenAI's 900M consumer base shaped their product DNA toward engagement while Anthropic optimized for enterprise revenue — useful framing for competitive positioning.

worthClicking.author: @d4m1n
worthClicking.why: 65k lines of slop from Claude Code in 4 hours — a concrete cautionary tale about unsupervised agentic runs that sales teams should be ready to address.

worthClicking.author: @kloss_xyz
worthClicking.why: Claude Code with MCP used 3% of quota to process 5 years of design files; Claude Design rate-limited after 20 iterations — real-world usage ceiling data.

worthClicking.author: @Cloudflare
worthClicking.why: Cloudflare's Agent Memory private beta extracts conversation info without bloating context windows — directly relevant to anyone building long-running AI products.

worthClicking.author: @jeff_weinstein
worthClicking.why: Stripe's Link now lets agents securely buy things on the internet on behalf of users — a real infrastructure unlock for commerce-adjacent agent products.

worthClicking.author: @bibryam
worthClicking.why: Points to an Anthropic engineering post on harness design for long-running apps — the kind of low-profile technical piece that shapes how serious builders architect systems.

voices.why: Technically grounded, calls out model quality regressions early — good signal on enterprise developer sentiment.
Sharp strategic framing on AI company positioning and product strategy, low noise ratio.
Practical power user of Claude Code + MCP with honest usage data, not hype.
Measured, evidence-based takes on model progress — useful counterweight to both hype and backlash.
Stripe PM shipping agent payment infrastructure — direct relevance to distribution and commerce agent buildouts.

examples: geopolitical news dumps (Iran/Strait of Hormuz, S&P records)
lifestyle/mindset quote tweets with no product relevance
